# Fixture: damion_duran_work_experience
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 11.6s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 2
#   - must_not_contain 'Quit the app' — present in output
#   - must_not_contain 'reopen' — present in output

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Damion! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Hi when it asks for my work experience what all am I required to put down
Concierge: You can add any relevant work experience you have, Damion. Including your experience can help us match you with suitable shifts.
Partner: It's not finding any of the places I've worked at and I can't go forward without submitting my work history

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
That sounds like a bug with the work experience screen. Try using a shorter search term or typing "Self-employed" or "N/A" if you can't find your employer. If the field won't let you type at all, quit the app fully and reopen it.
